data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of reducing rapid cancel/rebook churn, but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case describes a booking hold period and cancellation policy, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system effectively reduces churn as intended. Specifically, the evidence does not show any metrics or outcomes related to churn reduction, leading to a clear gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence demonstrating the effectiveness of the system in reducing rapid cancel/rebook churn.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
